architectureNotes: VERIFIED against config.js: widget name is 'Thumbs Card Header' and dataType is 'thumbs-card-header' (NOT 'thumbcard' as the QC catalog states). The config widget catalog is the source of truth; the slug 'thumbcard' is the test-runner folder name only.

FLAG-GATED: config.js sets "thumbs-card-header": false for most subjects/modules and true for only a few. The drop helper and every canvas/settings test degrade gracefully (cy.log + return) when the widget is not offered in the active catalog.

Thumbs Card Header is an ELEMENT (not an assessment widget). 'thumbs-card-header' is absent from support/module-setup.ts ASSESSMENT_DATA_TYPES, so resolveDropTarget routes it to the canvas — it drops onto the Instructions-for-Students page (#desktop_view) via cy.dropComponent('Thumbs Card Header'), not into a Generic Step column.

Canvas DOM: section.thumbs-card-header[thumbs-card-header-template] > .thumbs-card-container (ng-style headerBgColor/headerStrokeColor) > .thumbs-card-header-div containing a fixed icon span (img.thumbs-card-header-icon) and a contenteditable heading (.thumbs-card-header-heading.editables, ng-model fieldData.introductionText).
The fixed icon src is data-driven from settings.thumbsCardIcons[thumbsCardActiveIcons].icon; the img has no contenteditable and no ng-click — it is not user-editable (TC_10).

Settings panel container is .thumbs-card-header-setting with title 'Thumbs Card Header' and icon .icon-Thumbs-Card-Header1.settings-icon. It exposes two selectable thumbs icons (.icons-item over currSettings.thumbsCardIcons), Background Color (#headerBgColorInput, default #FFF1D0), Stroke Color (#headerStrokeColorInput, default #FFFFFF), and an Alt Text textarea (maxlength 2000).

SINGLE-HEADER component: the source DOM is one icon + one heading. There is NO multi-card grid, NO 'add/remove card' action, NO per-card link, and NO 'Rounded Corners Text Box' in this source. QC wording referencing those is documented against the real single-header structure or deferred; addThumbcardCard logs that no such control exists.

Heading is wired to the shared floating textEditor toolbar (math-read-only-field). RTE formatting/math controls and their APPLIED render are verified in Preview/Reader (deferred); contenteditable presence + text/line-break entry is automated.

QC TC_01–TC_03 are login/activity bootstrap (handled by the harness). Persistence-after-reload (TC_12/17/18/19/26/31), Preview/Reader/CLP/Publish/saLTIre (TC_20–TC_28), cross-browser (TC_29/30), Figma match (TC_32), and math+formatted-text render (TC_33/34) are deferred.
